title: [skip-ci] TMT: keep PR-label independent tests
body:
Switch to keeping TMT tests independent of PR labels for now.

In order to keep PR-label dependent tests, Packit UI would need improvement making it clear that some tests are not meant to run, perhaps also changing the status to `ignore` or `neutral`.

comments.body:
> (On release branches, it’s mostly us doing the backports, so I’m not concerned about a bit confusing UI. But, to leave a breadcrumb, on _future_ release branches we will need to re-enable the release-branch testing.)

A dirty-but-works way would be to remove the entire `tf-extra-params` from the packit job. That would ensure we only test with official distro packages.

If we expect new branches to be cut in 3-6 months, maybe we don’t need a dirty-but-works hack for now. Hopefully TMT will improve this in the meantime — and if not, we have these comments just to record what is going on, and we can add hacks later.
